---
title: "WSJF Priority Board"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display
import plotly.graph_objects as go

_candidates = [Path("data/wsjf.json"), Path("../data/wsjf.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/wsjf.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report wsjf"
    )

d          = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group      = d["group"]
summary    = d["summary"]
candidates = d["candidates"]
blocked_bv = d["blocked_bv"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>Weighted Shortest Job First (WSJF) ranks portfolio backlog items by the ratio of
Cost of Delay to Job Size. Higher score = should be sequenced first.</p>
""")
```

## Summary

```{python}
s = summary
html = '<table class="table table-sm table-striped" style="max-width:400px"><thead><tr><th></th><th>Count</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
html += f"<tr><td>Fully scored</td><td>{s['scored']}</td></tr>"
html += f"<tr><td>Partially scored (missing component or job size)</td><td>{s['partial']}</td></tr>"
html += f"<tr><td>Portfolio Backlog (no PI)</td><td>{s['backlog']}</td></tr>"
html += f"<tr><td>In-flight (PI assigned)</td><td>{s['in_flight']}</td></tr>"
html += "</tbody></table>"
HTML(html)
```

## 🫧 WSJF Bubble Chart

Cost of Delay (x) vs. Job Size (y). Bubble size = WSJF score. Color = type.
Items in the **top-left** quadrant have high CoD relative to their size — do these first.

```{python}
scored = [c for c in candidates if c["score"] is not None and c["size"] is not None]

if not scored:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No fully-scored candidates to plot.</em></p>"))
else:
    COLOR_MAP = {"Feature": "#3b82f6", "Capability": "#10b981", "Epic": "#f59e0b"}
    type_order = ["Feature", "Capability", "Epic"]

    fig = go.Figure()
    for etype in type_order:
        pts = [c for c in scored if c["type"] == etype]
        if not pts:
            continue
        cod   = [(c["value"] or 0) + (c["urgency"] or 0) + (c["risk"] or 0) for c in pts]
        sizes = [c["size"] for c in pts]
        scores= [c["score"] for c in pts]
        ranks = [c["rank"]  for c in pts]
        texts = [
            (f"<b>#{c['rank']} {c['title']}</b><br>"
             f"Score: {c['score']}<br>"
             f"CoD: BV={c['value'] or '—'} | Urgency={c['urgency'] or '—'} | Risk={c['risk'] or '—'}<br>"
             f"Size: {c['size']}<br>"
             f"PI: {c['piid'] or 'backlog'}")
            for c in pts
        ]
        # Scale bubble size by score (8–40px range)
        min_s, max_s = min(scores), max(scores)
        rng = max_s - min_s or 1
        bub = [8 + 32 * (s - min_s) / rng for s in scores]

        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=cod, y=sizes,
            mode="markers+text",
            name=etype,
            marker=dict(
                size=bub,
                color=COLOR_MAP.get(etype, "#6b7280"),
                opacity=0.75,
                line=dict(width=1, color="white"),
                sizemode="diameter",
            ),
            text=[f"#{r}" for r in ranks],
            textposition="middle center",
            textfont=dict(color="white", size=10),
            hovertext=texts,
            hoverinfo="text",
        ))

    fig.update_layout(
        xaxis_title="Cost of Delay  (BV + Urgency + Risk)",
        yaxis_title="Job Size  (Planned Weight)",
        legend_title="Type",
        height=480,
        margin=dict(l=60, r=30, t=30, b=50),
        plot_bgcolor="#f9fafb",
        paper_bgcolor="white",
        font=dict(size=13),
        hovermode="closest",
    )
    fig.add_annotation(
        text="← Do first",
        x=0, y=1, xref="paper", yref="paper",
        showarrow=False, font=dict(size=11, color="#6b7280"),
        xanchor="left", yanchor="top",
    )
    fig.show()
```

## 📊 WSJF Score Bar — Top 20

```{python}
top = sorted([c for c in candidates if c["score"] is not None], key=lambda x: x["rank"])[:20]

if not top:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No scored candidates.</em></p>"))
else:
    COLOR_MAP = {"Feature": "#3b82f6", "Capability": "#10b981", "Epic": "#f59e0b"}
    labels  = [f"#{c['rank']} {c['title'][:35]}{'…' if len(c['title'])>35 else ''}" for c in top]
    scores  = [c["score"] for c in top]
    colors  = [COLOR_MAP.get(c["type"], "#6b7280") for c in top]
    hovers  = [
        f"<b>#{c['rank']} {c['title']}</b><br>WSJF: {c['score']}<br>Type: {c['type']}<br>PI: {c['piid'] or 'backlog'}"
        for c in top
    ]

    fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(
        x=scores,
        y=labels,
        orientation="h",
        marker_color=colors,
        hovertext=hovers,
        hoverinfo="text",
    ))
    fig.update_layout(
        xaxis_title="WSJF Score",
        height=max(300, len(top) * 28),
        margin=dict(l=250, r=30, t=20, b=40),
        plot_bgcolor="#f9fafb",
        paper_bgcolor="white",
        font=dict(size=12),
        yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"),
    )
    fig.show()
```

## Ranked Board

```{python}
if not candidates:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No WSJF-scored epics found. Set the Business Value custom field via "
         "<code>set-business-value</code>, and apply <code>wsjf-urgency::N</code> and "
         "<code>wsjf-risk::N</code> labels (Fibonacci scale: 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13) to open "
         "epics.</em></p>"))
else:
    html = '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered"><thead><tr>'
    html += "<th>Rank</th><th>Epic</th><th>Type</th><th>PI</th><th>BV</th><th>Urgency</th><th>Risk</th><th>Size</th><th>WSJF</th>"
    html += "</tr></thead><tbody>"
    for c in candidates:
        link   = f'<a href="{c["url"]}" target="_blank">{c["title"]}</a>' if c["url"] else c["title"]
        piid   = c["piid"] or "<em>backlog</em>"
        v_str  = str(c["value"])   if c["value"]   is not None else "—"
        u_str  = str(c["urgency"]) if c["urgency"] is not None else "—"
        r_str  = str(c["risk"])    if c["risk"]    is not None else "—"
        s_str  = str(c["size"])    if c["size"]    is not None else "—"
        sc_str = f'<strong>{c["score"]}</strong>' if c["score"] is not None else "<em>partial</em>"
        html  += f"<tr><td>{c['rank']}</td><td>{link}</td><td>{c['icon']} {c['type']}</td><td>{piid}</td><td>{v_str}</td><td>{u_str}</td><td>{r_str}</td><td>{s_str}</td><td>{sc_str}</td></tr>"
    html += "</tbody></table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

```{python}
if blocked_bv:
    bv   = blocked_bv
    html = f"<h2>Blocked Business Value</h2>"
    html += f"<p><strong>Total Business Value at Risk: {bv['total_bv']}</strong> <em>(sum of {len(bv['portfolio_epics'])} distinct Portfolio Epic(s))</em></p>"

    for pe in bv["portfolio_epics"]:
        link   = f'<a href="{pe["url"]}" target="_blank">{pe["title"]}</a>' if pe["url"] else pe["title"]
        bv_str = str(pe["bv"]) if pe["bv"] is not None else "—"
        html  += f"<p>- {link} — BV: {bv_str}</p>"

    html += "<h3>Blocking Detail</h3>"
    html += '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered"><thead><tr>'
    html += "<th>Epic at Risk</th><th>BV</th><th>Blocked Item</th><th>Type</th><th>Blocker(s)</th>"
    html += "</tr></thead><tbody>"
    for row in bv["detail_rows"]:
        pe_link  = f'<a href="{row["pe_url"]}" target="_blank">{row["pe_title"]}</a>' if row["pe_url"] else row["pe_title"]
        bl_link  = f'<a href="{row["blocked_url"]}" target="_blank">{row["blocked_title"]}</a>' if row["blocked_url"] else row["blocked_title"]
        bv_str   = str(row["pe_bv"]) if row["pe_bv"] is not None else "—"
        blk_str  = ", ".join(
            f'<a href="{b["url"]}" target="_blank">{b["title"]}</a>' if b["url"] else b["title"]
            for b in row["blockers"]
        )
        html += f'<tr><td>{pe_link}</td><td>{bv_str}</td><td>{bl_link}</td><td>{row["blocked_icon"]} {row["blocked_type"]}</td><td>{blk_str}</td></tr>'
    html += "</tbody></table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## How WSJF Works

**WSJF = (Business Value + Time Criticality + Risk Reduction) ÷ Job Size**

| Component | Source | What it measures |
|-----------|--------|-----------------|
| Business Value | Custom field (Fibonacci 1–21) | Economic benefit |
| Time Criticality | `wsjf-urgency::N` | Cost of delay — how fast does value decay? |
| Risk Reduction | `wsjf-risk::N` | Risk reduced or opportunity enabled by this work |
| Job Size | Epic planned weight | Relative effort |

**Fibonacci scale:** 1 · 2 · 3 · 5 · 8 · 13 _(higher = more)_

A score of 8.0 means the item delivers 8× more value per unit of effort than a score-1 item.

| Score display | Condition |
|---------------|-----------|
| **N.NN** (bold) | All three components present and job size > 0 |
| _partial_ | Missing a component or job size |
:::
